Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

Howard Robison papers, [ca. 1956-1974]
Collection Number: 3394

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
Howard Robison papers, [ca. 1956-1974]
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
3394
Abstract:
Personal papers and clippings from years in office as a member of the House of Representatives. Papers include files relating to campaigns and elections, constituent requests, general files, files relating to bills, invitations, files relating to military and social security cases, military academies, veterans, gun control, the Vietnam War and the draft, aging and senior citizens, and files relating to local issues such as post offices, local airports, floods, interns, federally-funded projects, and Cornell University.
Creator:
Robison, Howard W. (Howard Winfield), 1915-1987.
Calkins, John T.
Quanitities:
239.4 cubic feet.
23 audiocassettes.
Language:
Collection material in English
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE

Congressman.
Howard W. Robison practiced law in Owego, N.Y., served as county attorney of Tioga County, N.Y. from 1946 until 1956 when he was elected as a Republican to the Eighty-fifth Congress to fill the vacancy caused by the resignation of W. Sterling Cole; he was reelected and served in the House of Representatives until his retirement in 1974.
Restrictions on use:

Case files are available to legitimate scholars with the understanding that the identity of individuals in these files is not to be published or otherwise released in such form that any individual mentioned in the records can be identified. Reference can be made to individual cases, but only on an anonymous basis.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

Howard W. Robison papers, #3394. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content

Correspondence, invitations, other personal papers, bills, press releases, and clippings from years in office as a member of the House of Representatives. Papers include files relating to campaigns and elections, constituent requests, general files, files relating to bills, invitations, files relating to military and social security cases, military academies, veterans, gun control, the Vietnam War and the draft, aging and senior citizens, and files relating to local issues such as post offices, local airports, floods, interns, federally-funded projects, and Cornell University. Also, tapes of "Robison Reports," 1968-1974, interviews on national events, John T. Calkins, interviewer. Copies of newsletters, Your Washington Report and Robison Reports, sent to constituents, 1958-1971.

Robison, Howard W. (Howard Winfield), 1915-1987.

Military pensions.
Veterans -- Medical care.
Elections -- New York (State)
Politics, Practical.

 date unknown

Robison Speech File
 date unknown

Co-signature Letters
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 30 "Intergovernmental Cooperation Act"
 1971
Scope and Contents
To Improve the financial management of Federal assistance programs, to facilitate the consolidation of such programs, to strengthen further congressional review of Federal grants-in-aid, to provide a catalog of Federal Assistance programs & to extend and amend the law relating to intergovernmental cooperation.
Box 129
H.R. 850 - To extend to all unmarried individuals the full tax benefits of income splitting now enjoyed by married individuals filing joint returns.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 1460 - To provide that the fiscal year shall coincide with the calendar year.
Box 129
H.R. 2571 - To provide for a limitation on budget expenditures & net lending for fiscal year not to exceed $229.2 Billion
 1972
Box 129
H.R. 3119 - To authorize the Secretary of Interior to establish the Lincoln Home National Historic Site in the State of Illinois & for other purposes.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 3612 - To amend the Internal Revenue Code to allow credit against income tax for certain higher educational expenses.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 3787 - To fix date of citizenship of Alfred Lorman for purposes of War Claims Act
 1948
Box 129
H.R. 3863 - To create a catalog of Federal assistance Programs, and for other purposes.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 4191 - Revenue Sharing Act.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 4452 - Volunteer Army.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 4716 - To establish an Office of Consumer Affairs in the Executive Office of the President and a Consumer Protection Agency.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 4932 - To repeal the Connally Hot Oil Act.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 4935 - To terminate the Oil Import Control Program.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 5412 - To make available to certain organized tribes, bands or groups of Indians residing on Indian reservations established under State Law certain benefits, care or assistance for which federally recognized Indian tribes qualify as recipients.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 5413 - To amend the Water Resources Research Act
 1964
Scope and Contents
To increase the authorization for water resources research and institutes, and for other purposes.
Box 129
H.R. 5243 - To amend title 18 USC to prohibit the establishment of emergency detention camps and to provide that no citizen of the United States shall be committed for detention or imprisonment in any facility of the United States Government except in conformity with the provisions of title 18.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 5089 - To set standards of ethics and financial disclosure in campaigns for election to Federal Office.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 5092 - To provide certain amounts of television program time for candidates for Federal offices during general elections.
 date unknown
Box 129
H.R. 5098 - Tax Credits for Political Contributions.
 1971
Box 130
H.R. 5959 - To amend the Federal Water Pollution Control Act.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 5963 - To amend Section 8 of the Federal Water Pollution Control Act, as amended, and for other purposes.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 5967 - To amend the Federal Water Pollution Act, as amended.
Box 130
H.R. 5971 - To establish an Environmental Financing Authority to assist in the financing or waste treatment facilities and other purposes.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 6363 - To amend the Economic Opportunity Act
 1964
Scope and Contents
To authorize a legal services program by establishing a National Legal Services Corporation, and for other purposes.
Box 130
H.R. 6492 - To provide Federal assistance for special projects to demonstrate the effectiveness of programs to provide emergency care for heart attack victims by trained persons in specially equipped ambulances.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 6842 - To authorize a White House Conference on Education.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 6884 - To prohibit discharge of any military material or other refuse into navigable waters of the United States or into international waters, and for other purposes.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 19329 - To require the Department of Defense to determine disposal dates and methods for disposing of certain military material.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 7414 - To amend the State Technical Services Act
 1965
Scope and Contents
To make municipal governments eligible for technical services under the Act, to extend the Act though fiscal year 1974, and for other purposes.
Box 130
H.R. 7750 - To provide a comprehensive child development program in the Department of Health, Education & Welfare.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 7903 - To amend the Immigration and Nationality Act, and for other purposes.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 8028 - To incorporate the Gold Star Wives of America.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 8222 - To provide that expenses incurred in the construction of the Elmira Psychiatric Center in the city of Elmira, New York, shall be eligible as local grants-in-aid for purposes of title I of the Housing Act
 1949
Box 130
H.R. 8387 - To provide a procedure for the exercise of congressional and executive powers over the use of any Armed Forces of the United States in military hostilities, and for other purposes.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 9089 - To amend the Railway Labor Act.
 date unknown
Scope and Contents
To provide more effective means for protecting the public interest in national emergency disputes involving the railroad and airline transportation industries, and for other purposes.
Box 130
H.R. 9256 - To authorize the Secretary of the interior to establish the Lincoln Home National Historic Site in the State of Illinois, and for other purposes.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 10801 - To provide for the elimination, over a ten year period, of the mandatory oil import control program.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 11098 - To amend the federal Voting Assistance Act.
 1955
Scope and Contents
To enlarge the class of persons provided with the opportunity to vote in Federal, State and local elections by absentee ballot.
Box 130
H.R. 12660 - To amend the Internal Revenue Code.
 1954
Scope and Contents
To allow a deduction for contributions to candidates for elective Federal Office or to political parties.
Box 130
H.R. 13078 - For the relief of Herman Frederick Erben.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 13948 - The Consumer Protection Act.
 1969
Box 130
H.R. 13984 - Revenue Sharing Act.
 1969
Box 130
H.R. 14831 - To amend the Internal Revenue Code.
 1954
Scope and Contents
To allow a credit against income tax to individuals for certain expenses incurred in providing higher education.
Box 130
H.R. 15957 - To amend the Water Resources Act.
 1964
Scope and Contents
To increases the authorization for water resources research and institutes, and for other purposes.
Box 130
H.R. 16027 - To amend the Federal Water Pollution Control Act as amended.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 16029 - To amend the Federal Water Pollution Control Act, as amended, to provide financial assistance for the construction of waste treatment facilities and for other purposes.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 16030 - To establish an environmental financing authority to assist in the financing of waste treatment facilities and for other purposes.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 17278 - To make available to certain organized tribes, bands, or groups of Indians residing on Indian reservations established under State law certain benefits, care, or assistance for which federally recognized Indian tribes qualify as recipients.
 date unknown
Box 130
H.R. 18615 - Voluntary Military Manpower Procurement Act.
 1970
Box 130
H.R. 18876 - To provide for fiscal responsibility through the establishment of a limitation on budget expenditures and net lending (budget outlays) for the fiscal year, and for other purposes.
 1971
